mapper.select: select oauth_account_id, member_id, provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_nickname, connected_at, last_login_at from member_oauth_accounts where provider = #{provider} and provider_user_id = #{providerUserId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into member_oauth_accounts ( member_id, provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_nickname, connected_at, last_login_at ) values ( #{memberId}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{providerEmail}, #{providerNickname}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') )
